title: I Built 3 Lead Gen AI Agents Using ONLY My Words (beginner tutorial)

extracted.hook: Today I'm going to be building a lead generation and outreach system right here in front of you guys just using my natural words.
transitions: So, the first thing you'll notice over here is that the agent builder asks us some follow-up questions to make sure that it's going to build the system exactly like we want it to.
Okay, so I think it's finished up.
All right, so I told it that it worked, but it only added five of the leads to the sheet, not all 10.
So, let's move on to the second agent that we need to build for this system.
extracted.cta: "if you guys enjoyed or learned something new, please give it a like. It definitely helps me out a ton."
extracted.analogies: "I think that natural language to workflow building is super super cool"
extracted.vulnerability: "I am worried about the false sense of security that it may bring to people"

accelerates: discussing the lead generation and outreach system
slows: explaining the agent builder process in detail
